title: New Default+
description: A vanilla-style pack using OptiFine to add thousands of new features!
body:
![New Default+ Logo Banner 2024](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_7f09a54403d84afda84211f25088cd7c~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_1542,h_213,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_auto/new_default_plus_logo_new3_black_outline_x25.png)
# **Texture/resource pack**
![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
**Customize your player by renaming items to change their textures, explore a new richer world with tons of variation, and experience default-style changes and features to enhance the vanilla experience.**
![divider](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_ab455951e8b24116b88fb44e341beeac~mv2.png)
**New Default+ is updated at the end of every month! Always download the latest New Default+ update for your Minecraft version for the best experience! New Default+ is usable without OptiFine / Fabulously Optimized, but many of the features require it.**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
## New Default+ v1.82 the "Spears & Steeds" update has been released! [See Changelog](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/screenshots-update-posters)
![update_poster](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_5c5faad466984afb8f90845403874bf2~mv2.png)
![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
**[Fabulously Optimized](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fabulously-optimized) + [Variants CIT](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/variants-cit) is the recommended setup when playing in modern versions, instead of OptiFine.**
**[Fabulously Optimized Settings](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/fabulously-optimized-settings)**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)

- **See the [New Default+ Wiki](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/downloads)**
- **Support New Default+ by becoming a Patron over at the [New Default+ Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/new_default_plus)**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Feature Screenshots:
![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Rename your sword to change its texture!
![Rename your sword to change its texture!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_82ef22f1a0c34f9ab2285decc2f898b4~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized only in versions before 1.21.5!**
- **See all anvil item names on the New Default+ Wiki: [New Default+ Wiki (Anvil Swords)](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/anvil-item-names-swords)**
- **Includes swords from Minecraft: Dungeons and Minecraft: Story Mode.**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Biome-dependent blocks and features!
# ![Biome-dependent blocks and features!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_bd743bce83cb4c7085e1866f4690cf3c~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized!**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Rename your tools to change their textures!
![Rename your tools to change their textures!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_9069ba1fbcce4390a97020e53d4bdb99~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized only in versions before 1.21.5!**
- **See all anvil item names on the New Default+ Wiki: [New Default+ Wiki (Anvil)](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/anvil-item-names)**
- **Includes tools from Minecraft: Dungeons and Minecraft: Story Mode.**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Overworld pixel art skies:
![Overworld pixel art skies:](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_e1f88264bd9743c595b0e5f1ae31abf6~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized!**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Rename your armor to change its texture!
![Rename your armor to change its texture!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_90491b4c71544695b47dcb8f9bfaa603~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized! With Fabulously Optimized 1.21.5 or above, Variants CIT is also required!**
- **See all anvil item names on the New Default+ Wiki: [New Default+ Wiki (Anvil Armor Sets)](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/anvil-item-names-armor-sets)**
- **Includes armor sets from Minecraft: Dungeons and Minecraft: Story Mode.**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Pixel art end sky and chorus end stone!
![Pixel art end sky and chorus end stone!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_50b374fc45504efeb22ec897cbd7beb1~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized!**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Rename your bow and crossbow to change their textures!
![Rename your bow and crossbow to change their textures!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_0bd159bfa8d14919b7bc283934874b24~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized only in versions before 1.21.5!**
- **See all anvil item names on the New Default+ Wiki: [New Default+ Wiki (Anvil)](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/anvil-item-names)**
- **Includes bows and crossbows from Minecraft: Dungeons and Minecraft: Story Mode.**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Unique potion bottles!
![Unique potion bottles!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_7cd111cdca6447d48d7e1039721b3080~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized only in versions before 1.21.5!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Rename your shield and elytra to change their textures!
![Rename your shield and elytra to change their textures!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_adff9b1eabb447c692c875dabdb924ae~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized only in versions before 1.21.5 (shields only)! Elytras require them even version 1.21.5 and after, and with Fabulously Optimized 1.21.5 or above, Variants CIT is also required!.**
- **See all anvil item names on the New Default+ Wiki: [New Default+ Wiki (Anvil)](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/anvil-item-names)**
- **Includes shields from Minecraft: Dungeons and Minecraft: Story Mode.**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Enchantment icons & enchantment text colors!
![Enchantment icons & enchantment text colors!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_9a009185f06e45f486cb622be671c996~mv2.png)

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Rename your totems, bundles, and helmets to change their textures!
![Rename your totems, bundles, and helmets to change their textures!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_bd922a1357054765ac7eba2ddb26c529~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized only in versions before 1.21.5 (totems/bundles only)! Helmets require them even version 1.21.5 and after.**
- **See all anvil item names on the New Default+ Wiki: [New Default+ Wiki (Anvil)](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/anvil-item-names)**
- **Includes artifacts from Minecraft: Dungeons and Minecraft: Story Mode as renames for totems and bundles.**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Unique enchanted books!
![Unique enchanted books!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_3001473a02fb4dbc8c50f423a527984e~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized only in versions before 1.21.5!**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Rename passive mobs using a name tag to change their textures!
![Rename passive mobs using a name tag to change their textures!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_e894cc5342f74dcaaf1fc9df07fd9152~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized!**
- **Some spawn naturally in certain biomes, while others spawn as random variants.**
- **See all name tag mob names on the New Default+ Wiki: [New Default+ Wiki (Name Tag)](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/name-tag-mob-names)**
- **Includes mobs from Minecraft: Earth, Minecraft: Dungeons, and Minecraft: Story Mode.**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Unique spawn eggs!
![Unique spawn eggs!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_ddd8c53d538246c0bec043e4bd77f88b~mv2.png)

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Rename hostile mobs using a name tag to change their textures!
![Rename hostile mobs using a name tag to change their textures!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_f2bb0ce855cc4a2cb1cb823eb3eab6ed~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized!**
- **Some spawn naturally in certain biomes, while others spawn as random variants.**
- **See all name tag mob names on the New Default+ Wiki: [New Default+ Wiki (Name Tag)](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/name-tag-mob-names)**
- **Includes mobs from Minecraft: Earth, Minecraft: Dungeons, and Minecraft: Story Mode.**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Unique dark GUIs!
![Unique dark GUIs!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_d2a0f341375244928a3aee95c3286bf2~mv2.png)
- **The dark GUIs are available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack, but the unique ones are NOT.**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Rename rideable mobs using a name tag to change their textures!
![Rename rideable mobs using a name tag to change their textures!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_8dc16dfd50434c0b81fa301ae1d1f77a~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized!**
- **Camels can become Young Dragons, and horses can become Dragon Horses.**
- **See all name tag mob names on the New Default+ Wiki: [New Default+ Wiki (Name Tag)](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/name-tag-mob-names)**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Vibrant biome colors!
![Vibrant biome colors!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_0a65cd114f514b44b20ca0ca0ddfffb7~mv2.png)

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Rename your pets using a name tag to change their textures!
![Rename your pets using a name tag to change their textures!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_455df6fa0f9b4896bcb7603f5c978c56~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized!**
- **Allays can become Baby Dragons, wolves get lots of new variants, and cats can become various Golems.**
- **See all name tag mob names on the New Default+ Wiki: [New Default+ Wiki (Name Tag)](https://powerups4u.wixsite.com/seaofpixels/name-tag-mob-names)**
- **Includes mobs from Minecraft: Earth, Minecraft: Dungeons, and Minecraft: Story Mode.**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Additional paintings!
![Additional paintings!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_95461f67790b4f4186d7082e918db6c0~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized!**
- **Includes paintings from Minecraft: Dungeons and Minecraft: Story Mode.**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Stack two of the same slab for unique block variants!
![Stack two of the same slab for unique block variants!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_8a5dded0a5024d848cfdb2c4cef90069~mv2.png)
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Unique chests in different structures!
![Unique chests in different structures!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_42690f0358c74ad8bd8616650450075c~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized!**
- **Includes chests from Minecraft: Dungeons.**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Unique shulker box & villager GUIs!
![Unique shulker box & villager GUIs!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_06d47116029b402d8098cf94d407dd63~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized!**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Dimension loading screens!
![Dimension loading screens!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_bad0814c96814ed8a5585463cc7a42e7~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized!**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Animated glowing sculk!
![Animated glowing sculk!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_9cfb57eec1c1490796b63e8914604530~mv2.png)
- **Requires OptiFine or Fabulously Optimized!**
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Glow lichen replaced with cave crystals!
![Glow lichen replaced with cave crystals!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_9ad7fc6b516d4a2586dadf883f68d4df~mv2.png)
- **This feature is NOT available in the Bedrock (MCPE) pack!**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
# Blood moons every eight minecraft days!
![Blood moons every eight minecraft days!](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_b3261a31efcd49cb94a09697c61c7afe~mv2.png)
![divider](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_ab455951e8b24116b88fb44e341beeac~mv2.png)
![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
## Other sources that inspired or are included in this pack:
- **Minecraft Dungeons item textures and music**
- **Minecraft Story Mode armor textures and music**
- **Various "Vanilla Tweaks" packs (age 25 kelp tops [concept], directional hoppers [concept], less obtrusive rain, 3D blocks [concept])**
- **FaithfulTeam's "Minecraft Faithful" (font only)**
- **Okl1001's "Color Corkination" (concept)**
- **Yomny's "Better World Border"**
- **ForeverMaster's "FM Default" banner patterns (concept)**
- **sixfootblue's "Visual Fish Buckets" (concept)**
- **CraftMaster7's "Overworld Skybox" (inspiration)**
- **Gouchnox's "Unique Spawn Eggs" (backport file only)**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
## Special thanks:
- **Bonsai for help with Allay CEM**
- **Zenith for help with Camel CEM**
- **Beane for help with backporting features**
- **Ахуniх for help with manually converting the pack's OptiFine CIT items to Vanilla CIT**
- **Mariam for help with manually converting the pack's OptiFine CIT armor/elytras to Variants CIT**

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
## I hope you enjoy the pack! Make sure to always check back for the new updates every month! Report any bugs & make suggestions in the comments and on the discord! -SeaOfPixels

![divider_small](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/73bea7_47f2d72852b745b480548a428a67665f~mv2.png)
